reasoning: The informal statement asks to prove $x^3 - 9$ is irreducible in $\mathbb{F}_{31}$. The Lean formalization uses `Polynomial (ZMod 31)`, and since 31 is prime, `ZMod 31` is exactly the field $\mathbb{F}_{31}$. The element `X^3 - 9` in this polynomial ring corresponds precisely to $x^3 - 9 \in \mathbb{F}_{31}[x]$. The predicate `Irreducible` in Mathlib means the element is not a unit and any factorization into two elements has at least one unit, which is the standard notion of irreducibility in a commutative ring. No hypotheses are added or dropped, and the types and conclusion match exactly.
